#vent-search-input: width: 100%; padding: 12px; border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 4px; font-family: monospace;
#vent-results-list: list-style: none; padding: 0; margin-top: 5px; border: 1px solid #ccc; max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto;
#vent-results-list li: padding: 10px; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; transition: background 0.2s;
